subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hearest the clamor of my secrets and beholdest the blazing of my fire and my burning in the flames of separation and my consuming desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یسمع ضجیج اسراری و یری اجیج ناری و احتراقی من نیران فراقی و فرط اشتیاقی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
